description_long: This is a modern tactical axe featuring a robust, matte black handle with a textured grip for secure handling. The head of the axe is metallic with a striking red accent, and it has a dual-edged design: one side is a broad, sharp blade, while the opposite side tapers to a pointed pick. The blade includes three circular cutouts, likely for weight reduction and aesthetic appeal. The handle appears to be made of a durable synthetic or composite material, possibly reinforced with metal for strength. The overall design is sleek and aggressive, suitable for both utility and display in an urban environment.
description: A modern tactical axe with a black textured handle and a red-accented, dual-edged metallic head featuring circular cutouts.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from the side, highlighting the red-accented blade with three circular cutouts and the full length of the black handle.
description_view_1: This angled view emphasizes the pointed pick opposite the blade and the ergonomic grip of the handle.
description_view_2: A top-down silhouette reveals the thin profile of the blade and the straight alignment of the handle.
description_view_3: The axe is viewed from the blade edge, showing the sharpness of the blade and the thickness of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical black polymer handle with textured grip and subtle ridges for enhanced hold.
attribute_blade_design: Single broad blade with a sharp edge and three circular cutouts, opposite a pointed pick; red accent on the blade head.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite mounting, likely molded or integrated with the handle.
